top_signals.title: US Premarket Movers for May 29, 2026
top_signals.summary: S&P 500 Index futures rise 0.1% as of 7:31 a.m. in New York as traders wait to see whether the US and Iran can finally get a peace deal across the line.

top_signals.title: London was once a destination for the young, now it’s a compromise
top_signals.summary: New research shows a third of young Londoners expect to leave within two years. The city is pricing out its talent, says Festus Akinbusoye.
